channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Live Updates: As Iran war expands, Trump says he must have a role in choosing the country's next leader - CBS News
item.description:
1. Live Updates: As Iran war expands, Trump says he must have a role in choosing the country's next leader  CBS News

  3. Trump rejects Khamenei's son as Iran war intensifies with US-Israel strikes  Reuters
  4. Trump says he’ll help pick Iran’s leader, predicts regime change in Cuba  Politico
  5. Iran war: Trump wants role in picking Khamenei successor  dw.com
